description: You are a web developer performing a pre-deployment security assessment of competitor developer platforms. Audit the HTTP security headers of github.com, gitlab.com, bitbucket.org, npmjs.com, and pypi.org. For each site, record the actual header values for: Strict-Transport-Security, Content-Security-Policy (or Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only), X-Content-Type-Options, and X-Frame-Options (or any frame-ancestors CSP directive). Create a JSON audit report at ~/Documents/security_audit_report.json. The JSON must have one top-level key per site (using the domain name), and each entry must contain at least 3 header fields with their actual string values. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
